title: MR-09 append-only compensation path for reconciliation and ledger correction

forbidden_actions: SQL update StayBalance or DepositBalance as a fact source

steps: If a correction was applied incorrectly, create a follow-up correction request with reason and before/after impact.
Require finance approval for high-risk compensating correction before apply.
Append a correction reversal or correction entry that references the prior correction.
Reopen the ReconciliationCase when the match or mismatch decision needs more review.
Rebuild StayBalance and DepositBalance projections from append-only entries after compensation.
validation_steps: Verify the original ledger entry remains unchanged.
Verify the original correction remains visible in correction audit.
Verify the follow-up correction has reason, approval when required, and before/after view.
Verify StayBalance and DepositBalance rebuild after compensation.
Verify GateResult evidence maps the compensation to the relevant No-Go item.
